title: Why has no one made an EoE AMV Hell clip using the song
display_title: Why has no one made an EoE AMV Hell clip using the song
wikitext:
[]: Why has no one made an EoE AMV Hell clip using the song             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Fri Nov 13, 2009 5:04 pm "I'll Melt With You"? It writes itself, man.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Nov 13, 2009 5:26 pm Simply because no one has done it and/or hadn't thought of doing it and now because it's been asked I have a feeling someone on the forum is going to go ahead and do make a clip.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Fri Nov 13, 2009 10:30 pm Never heard of it. Wait, why did you make a new thread about nothing?

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Fri Nov 13, 2009 11:40 pm No one has made an EVA variation of Sweeney Todd either. There's a hole in the world like a spherical black pit, and the NERV of the world inhabit it, and its morals aren't worth what a tank could hit, and it goes by the name of To'kyo. At the top of the hole sit a privileged few making mock of the angels in the higher zoo, turning beauty into LCL and seed. I too have sailed the world and seen its wonders, for the cruelty of men is as wondrous as the moon. But there's no place like To'kyo!

[]:             Quote Post by AVman9 » Tue Nov 17, 2009 4:33 am Uriel Septim VII wrote: No one has made an EVA variation of Sweeney Todd either. There's a hole in the world like a spherical black pit, and the NERV of the world inhabit it, and its morals aren't worth what a tank could hit, and it goes by the name of To'kyo. At the top of the hole sit a privileged few making mock of the angels in the higher zoo, turning beauty into LCL and seed. I too have sailed the world and seen its wonders, for the cruelty of men is as wondrous as the moon. But there's no place like To'kyo!
